market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Airport Proximity, Private Home, Free Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to this newly updated 3-bedroom home with modern furnishings, situated just 5 minutes from [Airport Name] and offering free street parking. Ideal for travelers seeking convenience without airport shuttle fees, this property features a fully stocked kitchen, Wi-Fi, and a private backyard for relaxation. Despite its high price point, the home maintains a 4.07-star rating from 15 guests who praise its cleanliness and accessibility. Sleeps 4 with two queen beds, it’s perfect for families or groups needing short-term airport access. Book direct to bypass rental fees and enjoy priority check-in.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead photo should showcase the street view highlighting airport proximity (e.g., visible runway or road signage). Secondary photos should emphasize key differentiators: kitchen, parking space, and backyard.
key_diagnosis: Priced at £716/night (+309% vs median £175) but occupancy is 15.2% vs cohort’s 28.3% — indicating a price-to-occupancy mismatch.
Description lacks factual details, amenities, and guest benefits despite the premium rate.
Title omits 4.07-star rating, missing a trust signal critical for high-end bookings.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced at £716/night (+309% above median) but only 15.2% booked next 90 days vs 28.3% cohort average.
